mass_driver.name: Mass Driver
mass_driver.description: Standard issue kinetic cannon. Reliable, cheap, respectable stopping power.

laser_cannon.name: Laser Cannon
laser_cannon.description: High-energy coherent light beam. Excellent shield penetration.

neutron_gun.name: Neutron Gun
neutron_gun.description: Fires neutron bursts that bypass shields and damage hull directly. Short range.

tachyon_gun.name: Tachyon Cannon
tachyon_gun.description: Fires faster-than-light particles. Effectively impossible to dodge.

fracture_beam.name: Fracture Beam
fracture_beam.description: Ghost Fleet weapon of unknown mechanism. Warps spacetime locally.

dumbfire.name: Dumbfire Missile
dumbfire.description: Unguided rocket. High damage if it hits. Requires aim.

heat_seeker.name: Heat Seeker
heat_seeker.description: Infrared homing missile. Tracks engine heat signature.

image_recognition.name: Image Recognition Missile
image_recognition.description: Locks on to visual profile of target. Hard to evade with jamming.

torpedo.name: Photon Torpedo
torpedo.description: Anti-capital ship weapon. Devastating against large targets and deployed fighters.

void_missile.name: Void Missile
void_missile.description: Ghost Fleet ordnance. Tracks with inhuman precision.
